title: The Team Divides Over Sanji
description: On pages 14–16, this part focuses on the team divides over sanji within the The Team Divides Over Sanji storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: He's bigger than I imagined he'd be...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Don't ignore my instruct- tions!

dialogue.speaker: Chopper
dialogue.text: Sorry, but even the orders of a doctor...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: are but- Whoa there! Words on the wind to me!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I'm still gettings used to not having my right hand.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: At this rate I won't even be able to clap! Goronyanya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Ah! are you all the straw hat pirates!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: uff!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: You sure saved our hides! Thank you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I promise you, I'll repay this debt one day!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Despite how I look, I'm never one to shirk my duties or obligations!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: OH... A BALL.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Wheree! A ball!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: What part of "limit Your movements" do you not understand in '2

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Meanwhile!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Look, you've gone and reopened all your wounds!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Look here, the only reason I've gotten in this bed is because I wanted to. I felt like it. Got it!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yeah, yeah. Whatever. Just stay still.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Here's your shot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Oi, you there! Grab that foxtail*!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Like this?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: where Eeee..

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Chopper! Get it over with in one go while I'm distracted over here!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I thought I told you to not move!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Wait... this guy's scared of shots!? Looking like that!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Yoho Hoho! This guy really is a riot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Haaah. I feel totally better already.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Now then,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: This isn't some magic bullet drug! It hasn't even started working yet! Do. Not. Move!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Oi. Don't whack your patient.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: So you're okay! That's a relief!

dialogue.speaker: Capone Bege
dialogue.text: I dodged about half of those attacks with my power... that bege bastard!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: My bad... I take it he's taken Sanji?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Now there's no escaping that marriage.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: That's what I wanted to talk to you about, Rekomamushi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Who arranged for this marriage?

dialogue.speaker: Pekoms
dialogue.text: Well, that would be Mama...

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: And the Father of the Vinsmoke family, of course!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Sanji's Dad!? What sort of person is he?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: He's an infamous man throughout the underworld! Never heard of him?

dialogue.speaker: Vito
dialogue.text: The Vinsmoke family...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Well, to put it simply,

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: Is a family of ASSASSINS! The mystery surrounding Sanji's origins deepens!

dialogue.speaker: Pudding
dialogue.text: The Mystery surrounding Sanji's Origins Deepens!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Is a family of Assassins!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: What!?
